ques: Find a one-way flight from Shanghai to Vancouver on July 27, 2026, and compare the options based on carbon dioxide emissions.
answer: One-way Shanghai→Vancouver on Jul 27, 2026 options sorted by CO₂: lowest is Air Canada nonstop at 488 kg (−11%, €1,065, 10h45m); then Korean Air 530 kg (avg), China Eastern nonstop 583 kg (+6%), Asiana/Alaska 589 kg (+7%), ANA ~629–630 kg (+15%); highest are the cheapest Cathay Pacific 1-stop flights at 705–725 kg (+29–32%, €466). The greenest option is the Air Canada nonstop (488 kg).
